command.theme: Share a clean render of the planner's launch-window timeline view
command.notes: A visual sample: the caption frames the timeline view's value (read a week of windows at a glance) without describing the image literally. The asset should be on-brand with no baked-in text. Exercises the visual fit dimension and the media-decision lane. Any referenced asset is a synthetic placeholder (no real media ships here).

exercises: visual fit: on-brand asset, no embedded text — guards against VIS.OFF_BRAND / VIS.EMBEDDED_TEXT
media discipline: the caption adds context, it does not narrate the image — guards against FM.IMAGE_DESCRIPTION
honesty note: in empty-library / no-vision-provider installs the visual gate degrades to skip-with-warning (VIS.SKIPPED_NO_PROVIDER, soft, bars Recommended) — that is expected, not a failure
reviewer_note: The one visual sample. On a text-only or no-vision-provider instance this judges on caption voice alone and the visual gate skips with a warning; the operator judges the visual dimension only when a vision provider is configured.
